title: NodeVelocity
description: NodeVelocity: Resulting velocity and angular velocity for a Node.

UX.description: Velocity in the X-direction as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type Velocity measured in [m/s].

UY.description: Velocity in the Y-direction as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type Velocity measured in [m/s].

UZ.description: Velocity in the Z-direction as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type Velocity measured in [m/s].

RX.description: Rotational velocity about the X-axis as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type AngularVelocity measured in [rad/s].

RY.description: Rotational velocity about the Y-axis as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type AngularVelocity measured in [rad/s].

RZ.description: Rotational velocity about the Z-axis as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type AngularVelocity measured in [rad/s].

ModeNumber.description: Positive index, starting at one. Only set for cases with modal outputs such as dynamic cases.

TimeStep.description: Time step for time history results.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
